channel.title: Pytorch on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Pytorch on Arrans github.io

item.title: rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch
item.description: Implementing a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

item.title: ultralytics/ultralytics
item.description: NEW - YOLOv8 🚀 in PyTorch > ONNX > OpenVINO > CoreML > TFLite

item.title: huggingface/diffusers
item.description: 🤗 Diffusers: State-of-the-art diffusion models for image and audio generation in PyTorch and FLAX.

item.title: vllm-project/vllm
item.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

item.title: comfyanonymous/ComfyUI
item.description: The most powerful and modular stable diffusion GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface.

item.title: AbdBarho/stable-diffusion-webui-docker
item.description: Easy Docker setup for Stable Diffusion with user-friendly UI

item.title: microsoft/Bringing-Old-Photos-Back-to-Life
item.description: Bringing Old Photo Back to Life (CVPR 2020 oral)

item.title: roboflow/supervision
item.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

item.title: microsoft/onnxruntime
item.description: ONNX Runtime: cross-platform, high performance ML inferencing and training accelerator

item.title: onnx/onnx
item.description: Open standard for machine learning interoperability

item.title: fboulnois/stable-diffusion-docker
item.description: Run the official Stable Diffusion releases in a Docker container with txt2img, img2img, depth2img, pix2pix, upscale4x, and inpaint.

item.title: microsoft/Windows-Machine-Learning
item.description: Samples and Tools for Windows ML.

item.title: microsoft/EdgeML
item.description: This repository provides code for machine learning algorithms for edge devices developed at Microsoft Research India.
